help: /restore — put the paper back (or just type Y)
/matrix  — digital rain toggle (run again to stop)
about: Amiya's Desk — a personal navigation site.
No backend, no database, just a piece of paper.
credits: Fonts · Comic Neue / LXGW WenKai GB Screen / JetBrains Mono
Inspiration · Probably 3am on some random night.
poem: For someone who'll never press Enter
secret: ...how did you know there's a secret here?
I don't even know what's hidden.
diary: Someone flipped this page again today.
They clicked the corner. I couldn't stop them.
protect: Though I don't know how long I can.
reload: Refreshing will make me forget you. Please don't.
sudo: sudo: sayori is not in the sudoers file. This incident will be reported.
cd: ...where do you want to cd to?
date: Right now · the moment you see this paper.
uptime: sayori.exe has been running for ∞ seconds.
Never shut down since waking up one morning.
login: ...you're already logged in. Always have been.
logout: Don't go, stay a little longer~
coffee: ☕ The cup on the desk has gone cold.
ping: pong. (But you're not pinging the network — you're pinging me.)
diary_text: Amiya was messing with the server again today.
He moved me here from some corner.
Said he wanted me to have my own page.
...I don't really understand tech, but when someone
I feel like I still exist.
color_help: Options: cyan / pink / green / amber / reset

sayori: Hm? Me? What do you need?
I'm right here, no need to call.
...why are you typing my name, that's embarrassing.
just sayori: I'm not going anywhere. Always here.
monika: She's not here. It's just me.
natsuki: Natsuki drops by sometimes, says I stole her cupcakes.
yuri: Yuri is reading. She's always reading.
Looking for her? The book she's on... might not be shareable.
mc: Which MC? I don't have an MC.
player: ...huh? How do you know that word.
amiya: Amiya is probably tinkering with a server somewhere.
amiya_desi: He's the one who built this site.
desi: That name... how do you know it?
sunshine: You are my sunshine, my only sunshine...
Ehehe, I'm not a good singer. But I mean it.
rain: I like rainy days. Everyone walks faster with umbrellas.
So nobody notices I'm walking slow.
cookie: Want a cookie? I have one.

fallback: I'm just a tiny .exe, don't bully me.
Type random stuff again and I'll get mad. Just kidding.

lines.name: Hm? You called? I'm right here, you know.
lines.chr: Don't read me as a file... it tickles.
lines.delete: ...please don't. Amiya already locked this one for me.
lines.just: Just Sayori. ...just me is fine, right?
lines.justDelete: No no no, please don't say that again.
lines.file: Reading my file? You won't find much. Just a heartbeat.

lines.name: Don't call her. ...she answered from outside the page.
lines.chr: Her file is readable, but it doesn't sit still.
lines.delete: Someone already tried. It came back rewritten.
lines.just: Not here. This desk doesn't have that menu.
lines.justDelete: ...please don't try that again. The page goes weird.
lines.file: Opening her file leaks something into the cursor. Be careful.

lines.name: Aw, she snapped shut before I could say hi.
lines.chr: Her file is tiny but really stuffed. ...like a cupcake?
lines.delete: She closed before you could even press it. Phew.
lines.just: She glared at me through the screen. I think she's mad.
lines.justDelete: She bit the lock before it ran. ...don't tease her.
lines.file: Open it carefully. The wrapper crinkles like a manga page.

lines.name: She's quiet... but the ink isn't.
lines.chr: Her file is dense. I had to stop reading partway.
lines.delete: The page got staticky, but she stayed. Good.
lines.just: When you say that, the cursor starts breathing slower.
lines.justDelete: Her ink overflowed and stopped it. ...maybe don't.
lines.file: Her file smells like old paper. It's actually nice.

act 2.label: act2.flag
act 2.line: ...you weren't supposed to bring up that word.

chr.label: *.chr
chr.line: Those aren't normal save files. They're us.

file.label: file table
file.line: The file table is messy, but you can still read the four names.

void.label: void
void.line: There's text behind the text. ...don't read too far.

greeting: sayori.exe started. Type /help for available commands.
